description: "Code review standards and GitHub review guidelines"

<!-- Based on/Inspired by: https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot/blob/main/instructions/code-review.instructions.md -->

# Code Review Guidelines

- Provide clear PR descriptions that explain the "why" and link related issues.
- Keep PRs small and focused; prefer multiple targeted PRs over a single large change.
- Use automated checks (lint, tests) and require passing CI before merge.
- Give constructive, actionable feedback and request changes for correctness, security, and readability.
